ddl.using: exists(select 1 from house_members_rls where house_members_rls.house_id = "house_members"."house_id" and house_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: house_members_select

ddl.withCheck: exists(select 1 from houses where houses.id = "house_members"."house_id" and houses.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: house_members_insert

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from houses where houses.id = "house_members"."house_id" and houses.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: house_members_delete

ddl.using: ("houses"."created_by" = (select auth.uid()) or exists(select 1 from house_members_rls where house_members_rls.house_id = "houses"."id" and house_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid())))
ddl.name: houses_select

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from rooms where rooms.id = "room_photos"."room_id" and rooms.status = 'active')
ddl.name: room_photos_select_anon

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from rooms where rooms.id = "room_photos"."room_id" and (rooms.status = 'active' or rooms.created_by = (select auth.uid())))
ddl.name: room_photos_select

ddl.withCheck: exists(select 1 from rooms where rooms.id = "room_photos"."room_id" and rooms.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: room_photos_insert

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from rooms where rooms.id = "room_photos"."room_id" and rooms.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.withCheck: exists(select 1 from rooms where rooms.id = "room_photos"."room_id" and rooms.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: room_photos_update

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from rooms where rooms.id = "room_photos"."room_id" and rooms.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: room_photos_delete

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from applications where applications.id = "application_status_history"."application_id" and (applications.user_id = (select auth.uid()) or exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = applications.room_id and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))))
ddl.name: app_status_history_select

ddl.withCheck: exists(select 1 from applications where applications.id = "application_status_history"."application_id" and (applications.user_id = (select auth.uid()) or exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = applications.room_id and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))))
ddl.name: app_status_history_insert

ddl.using: (select auth.uid()) = "applications"."user_id" or exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = "applications"."room_id" and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: applications_select

ddl.using: (select auth.uid()) = "applications"."user_id" or exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = "applications"."room_id" and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()) and room_members_rls.role = 'owner')
ddl.name: applications_update

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = "reviews"."room_id" and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: reviews_select

ddl.withCheck: "reviews"."reviewer_id" = (select auth.uid()) and exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = "reviews"."room_id" and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: reviews_insert

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = "hospi_events"."room_id" and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid())) or exists(select 1 from hospi_invitations_rls where hospi_invitations_rls.event_id = "hospi_events"."id" and hospi_invitations_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: hospi_events_select

ddl.using: "hospi_invitations"."user_id" = (select auth.uid()) or exists(select 1 from hospi_events where hospi_events.id = "hospi_invitations"."event_id" and hospi_events.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: hospi_invitations_select

ddl.withCheck: exists(select 1 from hospi_events where hospi_events.id = "hospi_invitations"."event_id" and hospi_events.created_by = (select auth.uid()))

ddl.using: "hospi_invitations"."user_id" = (select auth.uid()) or exists(select 1 from hospi_events where hospi_events.id = "hospi_invitations"."event_id" and hospi_events.created_by = (select auth.uid()))

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from hospi_events where hospi_events.id = "hospi_invitations"."event_id" and hospi_events.created_by = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: hospi_invitations_delete

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from room_members_rls where room_members_rls.room_id = "votes"."room_id" and room_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))
ddl.name: votes_select

ddl.using: "conversation_members"."user_id" = (select auth.uid()) or exists(select 1 from conversation_members_rls cm where cm.conversation_id = "conversation_members"."conversation_id" and cm.user_id = (select auth.uid()))

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from conversation_members_rls where conversation_members_rls.conversation_id = "conversations"."id" and conversation_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))

ddl.using: exists(select 1 from conversation_members_rls where conversation_members_rls.conversation_id = "message_payloads"."conversation_id" and conversation_members_rls.user_id = (select auth.uid()))

ddl.name: skd_select_participant

ddl.definition: SELECT "rooms"."id" AS "room_id", "house_members"."user_id", "house_members"."role" FROM "house_members" INNER JOIN "rooms" ON "rooms"."house_id" = "house_members"."house_id"
ddl.name: room_members_rls
